vol_description:
Home visit video data sessions collected as part of the University of Alabama’s contributions to the NIH-funded Play and Learning Across a Year (PLAY) Project. Session data consist of the following:
-Video files of 1-hour natural play, 5-minute structured play, house walk-through, and questionnaires
-Responses to questionnaires covering the participant’s demographics, language, temperament, and locomotion
-Ambient noise decibel meter recordings captured during the 1-hour natural play
Contains Datavyu and corresponding video files for Adjective
2-3 hour long home observations of infants (12-24 months), their older siblings (24-52 months), and their caregivers
